title.ko: 인쇄기 또는 프레스 (복사기 또는 오피스 인쇄기 B41L)
title.en: PRINTING MACHINES OR PRESSES (manifolding devices or office printing machines B41L)

definition.ko: 평압인쇄기 B41F1/00 원압인쇄기 B41F3/00 윤전기 철판, 평판, 요판인쇄기 B41F5/00, B41F7/00, B41F9/00 기타 인쇄기; 복합인쇄기 B41F11/00, B41F17/00, B41F19/00 세부 B41F13/00 스크린 인쇄기 B41F15/00 전사인쇄 장치 B41F16/00 세부 인쇄용지 또는 다른 피인쇄재료의 취급; 그 처리 B41F21/00, B41F25/00, B41F22/00, B41F23/00 인쇄부속요소; 얼룩제거장치; 가압면, 전사면; 인주 찍기 장치 B41F27/00; 30/00; 31/00 보조장치; 세정장치 B41F33/00; 35/00

title.en: Platen presses, i.e. presses in which printing is effected by at least one essentially-flat pressure-applying member co-operating with a flat type-bed
for mono-impression printing, e.g. on sheets
with platen maintained parallel to bed during movement
for multi-impression printing in one or more colours, e.g. on webs
using swinging platens, or forme supports
for perfecting sheets, i.e. for printing on both sides of sheets
specially adapted for printing heads, e.g. letter heads
Clamps for conveying sheets and for holding same on the platens
using flat inking elements, e.g. discs
pivoting around the platen or base
supported on carriages for movement in or on runways
Arrangements of counting devices for counting sheets
to the hands of the operator

title.ko: 원압 인쇄기, 즉 적어도 하나의 평형한 판반과 운동하는 적어도 하나의 압동를 가지는 것
title.en: Cylinder presses, i.e. presses essentially comprising at least one cylinder co-operating with at least one flat type-bed
with impression cylinder or cylinders rotating unidirectionally
Twin presses, i.e. with more than one cylinder or type-bed
with impression cylinder or cylinders rotating in opposite directions during each working cycle
Twin presses, i.e. with more than one cylinder or type-bed

title.ko: 특수한 구조의 것 또는 특수한 목적의 것
title.en: of special construction or for particular purposes
with fixed type-beds and travelling impression cylinders
with cylinders travelling around type-beds having upper and lower printing surfaces
with type-beds and impression cylinders simultaneously movable relative to one another
Proof-print presses for relief printing, lithography or intaglio printing, i.e. presses for checking accuracy of printing surfaces

title.ko: 평판용(교정 인쇄기 B41F 3/28)
요판 또는 사진 요판술 인쇄(교정 인쇄기 B41F 3/28)
title.en: for intaglio or heliogravure printing (proof-print presses B41F0003280000)
for perfecting sheets, i.e. for printing on both sides thereof
for monocolour or multicolour printing on one side of webs, or for perfecting webs, i.e. monocolour or multicolour printing on both sides of webs

title.ko: 세부
판반; 그 지지체(B41F 3/52가 우선)

title.en: Apparatus for cooling, heating, or drying printing surfaces
Devices for adjusting cylinders relative to type-beds and setting in adjusted position
Applications of linkwork or gearing for producing reciprocatory or angular motion
Applications of braking devices or of devices for stopping type-bed in registered position
with several printing units in sequential arrangement
with several printing units in both superimposed and sequential arrangement
with several printing units arranged side by side
for printing on one side and on the other side of webs between the same forme and impression cylinders
with several impression cylinders arranged around a forme cylinder
using one impression cylinder co-operating with several forme cylinders

title.ko: 평판 윤전기

title.en: using printing units incorporating one forme cylinder, one transfer cylinder, and one impression cylinder, e.g. for printing on webs
using one transfer cylinder co-operating with several forme cylinders for printing on sheets or webs, e.g. sampling of colours on one transfer cylinder
using one impression cylinder co-operating with several transfer cylinders for printing on sheets or webs, e.g. satellite-printing units
using two cylinders one of which serves two functions, e.g. as a transfer and impression cylinder in perfecting machines
with two or more impression cylinders coacting with a single transfer cylinder
for printing on more than one web simultaneously
for printing on non-deformable material, e.g. sheet metal

title.ko: 세부
완충 장치

title.en: Ducts, containers, or like supply devices for liquids
Inking-rollers serving also to apply ink repellants
with supercooling for condensation of air moisture

title.ko: 습윤 롤러 떼어내기 또는 들어올리기 장치; 그것을 위한 지지, 조절 또는 제거 장치. (잉크 롤러를 위한 장치류 B41F 31/30)
title.en: Devices for tripping or lifting damping rollers; Supporting, adjusting, or removing arrangements therefor (such arrangements or devices for inking rollers B41F0031300000)
with doctors, scrapers, or like devices
with continuous flexible surfaces, e.g. endless bands
Removing or recovering ink from wiping mechanisms
Auxiliary devices for exchanging forme cylinders

title.ko: 다수의 인쇄판면을 지지하는 판동을 가지는 또는 철판 평판 요판 인쇄를 선택적으로 또는 결합하여 행하는 윤전기
title.en: Rotary presses or machines having forme cylinders carrying a plurality of printing surfaces, or for performing letterpress, lithographic, or intaglio processes selectively or in combination

title.ko: 증권용(증권 인쇄 B41M 3/14)
윤전기의 일반적인 세부
title.en: Common details of rotary presses or machines
Electric or hydraulic features of drives
Mechanical features of drives, e.g. gears, clutches
Conveying or guiding webs through presses or machines
with means for displacing the cylinders
with means for displacing the printing formes on the cylinders
Supports for bearings or supports for forme, offset, or impression cylinders
Means for cooling or heating forme or impression cylinders
Bearings mounted eccentrically of the cylinder axis
Cams, eccentrics, wedges, or the like
Guards or covers, e.g. for preventing ingress or egress of foreign matter
Arrangements to accommodate interchangeable cylinders of different sizes to enable machine to print on areas of different sizes
Printing units for inserting latest news

title.ko: 단일 판동의 선정 부분으로 인쇄시키는 장치(선정 부분에 인주 찍힘에 의한 것 B41F 31/18)
title.en: Arrangements to enable printing to be effected over selected areas of a single forme cylinder (by inking selected areas B41F0031180000)
by effecting relative movement of forme and impression cylinders during printing cycle
by projecting and retracting parts of the surface of the forme cylinder
Auxiliary folding, cutting, collecting or depositing of sheets or webs
with auxiliary equipment, e.g. for drying printed articles
with auxiliary equipment, e.g. for drying printed articles
for elongated flat articles, e.g. strips, bands
with two or more operative parts
Printing apparatus or machines of special types or for particular purposes, not otherwise provided for
for printing books or manifolding sets
for printing on filamentary or elongated articles or material, or on articles with cylindrical surfaces
on articles or material of indefinite length, e.g. wires, hoses, tubes or yarns
for printing on rolls of material, the roll serving as impression cylinder, e.g. strip printers
on end or bottom surfaces thereof
on curved surfaces of articles of varying cross-section, e.g. bottles, lamp glasses
on articles of uniform cross-section, e.g. pencils, rulers, resistors
for printing on flat surfaces of polyhedral articles
for printing on curved surfaces of conical or frusto-conical articles
for printing on curved surfaces of essentially spherical, or part-spherical, articles
on articles with surface irregularities, e.g. fruit, nuts
for printing on tablets, pills, or like small articles
Apparatus or machines for carrying out printing operations combined with other operations
using intaglio printing formes and wipers
Printing and embossing between a negative and a positive forme after inking and wiping the negative forme; Printing from an ink band treated with colour or "gold"

title.ko: 인쇄 장치 또는 기계를 통해 매엽지를 운반하기 위한 장치 (평압인쇄기를 통한 것 B41F 1/28)
인쇄 장치 또는 기계를 통해 매엽지를 운반하기 위한 장치 (평압인쇄기를 통한 것 B41F 1/28)
title.en: Devices for conveying sheets through printing apparatus or machines (through platen presses B41F0001280000)
Combinations of endless conveyors and grippers
Combinations of transfer drums and grippers
Adjusting leading edges, e.g. front stops
Adjusting lateral edges, e.g. side stops

title.ko: 인쇄물 또는 기계 부품에 오염을 방지하기 위한 수단(B41F 23/00에 선행 한다)
title.en: Means preventing smudging of machine parts or printed articles (B41F0023000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 매엽지, 권취지 또는 인쇄와 연관된 다른 물품의 표면을 처리하기위한 장치
title.en: Devices for treating the surfaces of sheets, webs or other articles in connection with printing

title.ko: 습윤기에 의한 것(평판 윤전기 B41F 7/24)
title.en: by dampening (in rotary lithographic machines B41F0007240000)
by heat drying, by cooling, by applying powders
Powdering devices, e.g. for preventing set-off
Print-finishing devices, e.g. for glossing prints
Devices for pressing sheets or webs against cylinders, e.g. for smoothing purposes

title.ko: 인쇄 요소 또는 판을 지지체에 부착하는 장치(화학적 수단에 의해 부착하는 것 B41N 6/00)
title.en: Devices for attaching printing elements or formes to supports (attaching by chemical means B41N0006000000)
for attaching printing elements to flat type-beds
for attaching printing elements to forme cylinders
for attaching printing formes to flat type-beds
for attaching non-deformable curved printing formes to forme cylinders
for attaching printing formes to intermediate supports, e.g. adapter members

title.ko: 피복막 부착용 장치 또는 준비장치 ; 피복막을 위한 안내장치 (준비장치 B41N/600)
title.en: Devices for attaching coverings or make-ready devices; Guiding devices for coverings (make-ready devices B41N0006000000)
attaching of endless or like continuously-fed coverings

title.ko: 잉크 공급 장치 또는 기기 (평압 인쇄기를 위한 잉크공급장치(inking units) B41F 1/40; 원압 인쇄기를 위한 잉크공급장치(inking units) B41F 3/81
title.en: Inking arrangements or devices (inking units for platen presses B41F0001400000;inking units for cylinder presses B41F0003810000)

title.ko: 잉크 덕트(ducts), 용기, 공급 또는 계량 장치
title.en: Ducts, containers, supply or metering devices
with duct-blades or like metering devices
Troughs or like reservoirs with immersed, or partly immersed, rollers or cylinders
with ink-ejecting means, e.g. pumps, nozzles

title.ko: 공급 롤러 또는 잉크 분출 롤러의 응용(동작 전달 롤러 B41F 31/14)
title.en: Applications of feed or duct rollers (messenger or moving transfer rollers B41F0031140000)
Applications of messenger or other moving transfer rollers
for inking selected parts of printing formes
for inking from interior of cylinder

title.ko: 잉크 도포 롤러의 구조(회전 석판 인쇄기에 있어서 잉크 제거제에 이용되는 잉크 도포 롤러의 이용 B41F 7/36)
title.en: Construction of inking rollers (inking-rollers serving also to apply ink repellants in rotary lithographic machines B41F0007360000)

title.ko: 잉크 도포 롤러의 떼어내기(tripping), 들어올리기, 조정, 제거하는 장치 그러기 위한 지지체, 베어링, 포오크
title.en: Arrangements for tripping, lifting, adjusting, or removing inking rollers; Supports, bearings, or forks therefor

title.ko: 들어올리기 또는 조정 장치(습윤 롤러들 위한 것 B41F 7/36)
title.en: Lifting or adjusting devices (for damping rollers B41F0007400000)
Cam, eccentric, wedge, or like devices

title.ko: 지시, 계수, 경보, 제어 또는 안전 장치 ( 평압인쇄기 B41F 1/00, 원압 인쇄기 내 B41F 3/84 ; 잉크 공급 또는 계수 장치 41F 31/02)
title.en: Indicating, counting, warning, control or safety devices (arrangements of counting devices in platen presses B41F0001000000, in cylinder presses B41F0003840000;ink supply or metering devices B41F0031020000)
Arrangements of indicating devices, e.g. counters

title.ko: 떼어내기 장치 또는 정지 운동(윤전기의 동 떼어내기 장치 B41F 13/24; 잉크 도포 롤러의 떼어내기 장치 B41F 31/30)
title.en: Tripping devices or stop-motions (cylinder-tripping devices of rotary presses or machines B41F0013240000;arrangements for tripping inking rollers B41F0031300000)
for starting or stopping operation of sheet or web feed
for starting or stopping operation of cylinders
for starting or stopping operation of damping or inking units
for starting or stopping the machine as a whole
Automatic control of tripping devices by feelers, photoelectric devices, pneumatic devices, or other detectors
Programming systems for automatic control of sequence of operations

title.ko: 권취지 파손 검출(B41F 33/04에 선행한다)
